name: conv2d-all-gradients-dedicated-file
description: Create a dedicated test file to gradient-check all three conv2d backward outputs (grad_input, grad_weights, grad_bias) across multiple configurations. Use when: (1) conv2d backward grad_weights and grad_bias lack finite-difference validation, (2) adding to an existing file would exceed the ADR-009 10-test limit, (3) issue requires dedicated file for all-output coverage.
